subject: Add support for pmem-csi plugin and e2e test
commit_message:

Patch Set 16: Code-Review+1

(2 comments)

Hi Tingjie,

Is this tested in VM and Baremetal right ? I think you included testing mechanism for Optane card in the system. LGTM. Just make sure that Optane dameonset is not running in Vagrant and in baremetal when optane card is not avaiable. If you tested these cases. I think the patch is good to go. After your response, we can merge the patch.

With regards,
Kural.
